emails.subject: Re: List of EnronOnline Confidentiality Agreements
emails.body: Re: List of EnronOnline Confidentiality Agreements thanks I thought financial times was signed by the counterparty? Enron North America Corp. From: Tana Jones 04/11/2000 02:17 PM

emails.subject: Re: List of EnronOnline Confidentiality Agreements
emails.body: Re: List of EnronOnline Confidentiality Agreements thanks I thought financial times was signed by the counterparty? Enron North America Corp. From: Tana Jones 04/11/2000 02:17 PM

emails.subject: Re: List of EnronOnline Confidentiality Agreements
emails.body: Re: List of EnronOnline Confidentiality Agreements We do have it signed. However, the Company's name was not correct in the agreement so I spoke to Wayne Greenberg and it said it was okay to go ahead and change the name on the C.A. he signed, and I just wanted to get a copy back from him initialled by the name change so we have a record of his agreement.

emails.subject: Re: List of EnronOnline Confidentiality Agreements
